text.message: You can steal my cards but you can't steal my heart
and 9/4/11 is open... I really though red would settle there... or 9/11/3
I messed up my initial settles
Your second one was a head scratcher
I'm trying to help red get army
8 is prob the best block, unless you have two knights
Maybe you have a mono waitig
You were way behind, now you're in solid spot
oj having so many knights is unllucky for them
I might need to start popoing decs
you could also be feeding red, you realize, right?
